steps.title: Focus on format
steps.content: The student wants to describe the format of 7 haiku (for St. Augustine). The relevant note is that the poem is written as a sequence of seven haiku.

steps.title: Reject context and purpose
steps.content: Choice A explains why Sanchez used haiku, not the poem's format. Choice B gives publication context and a publisher's description of the book. Choice C makes a broad claim about poems in Morning Haiku, not this poem's format. The answer is D.
